title: Grafana 12.1 — New Alert Rule Page (GA)
description: The Alert rule authoring page went GA in 12.1 (guided wizard, simplified routing, recording-rule parity). This demo shows live alert counts + links to the new UI.

options.content:
### What changed

12.1 moved the **Alert rule page** out of preview. You now get:

- A guided wizard for Grafana-managed alert rules (& recording rules from 12.0)
- Simpler *Notifications* step with step-mode routing
- Inline preview of the alert expression
- Parity with Prometheus-managed rules via `grafanaManagedRecordingRules`

### Try it

- [➡ Create a new alert rule](/alerting/new/alerting)
- [➡ Create a new recording rule](/alerting/new/recording)
- [➡ Alert rule list](/alerting/list)
- [➡ Contact points](/alerting/notifications)

### Suggested recipe

```
Name:       grafana:api_p95_breach
Expression: histogram_quantile(0.95,
              sum by (le)(rate(grafana_http_request_duration_seconds_bucket[5m]))
            ) > 0.5
For:        5m
Labels:     severity=warning, service=grafana
```

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le)(rate(grafana_alerting_rule_evaluation_duration_seconds_bucket[$__rate_interval]))) or on() vector(0)
